name: experiment_id
description: Experiment identifier used to link experiments across subsets, groups and subgroups

name: name_of_experiment
description: Name of experiment

name: exp_code_local
description: Locally used identifier for an experiment

name: experiment_name_local
description: Locally used name for an experiment

name: objectives_of_study
description: Objectives of the study

name: experiment_narrative
description: General description of experiment. Can include noteworthy events, findings, etc.

name: main_experiment_factor
description: Main factor, factors or interactions of interest in an experiment

name: experimental_factor_comb
description: Experimental factor combinations

name: number_of_replicates
description: Number of blocks or replicates

name: number_of_treatments
description: Number of treatments

name: method_notes
description: General notes on execution of experiment.

name: experiment_type
description: General type of experiment, e.g., varietal trial

name: experimental_design
description: Experimental design

name: site_name
description: Name of site for experiment

name: site_type
description: Type of site, e.g., station, on-farm

name: management_type
description: Whether managed by researchers, producers

name: experiment_year
description: Year associated with experiment or crop rotation

name: experiment_duration
description: Duration of experiment in years

name: exper_duration_seasons
description: Duration of experiment in seasons

name: anonymization
description: Indication of whether location should be anonymized (N= anonymize names, L = anonymize locations, NL or LN  = anonymize both names and location)

name: rotation
description: Crop rotation indicator (=1 for continuous, multi-year simulation, =0 for single year simulations with multiple initializations)

name: cropping_system
description: Cropping system descriptive name

name: ex_license
description: Data license name and url

name: distrib_restrictions
description: Distribution limitations for the data set

name: ex_funding_source
description: Funding source(s) for this data set

name: file_version
description: File version for ICASA standard

name: revision_date_first
description: Date the file was first created

name: revision_date_latest
description: Date the file was last revised

name: revision_notes
description: Notes describing reasons for the revision

name: metadata_notes
description: Any additional information describing or clarifying the metadata.

name: people_level
description: Unique identifier to identify a person associated with a dataset

name: researcher_last_name
description: Last name of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_first_name
description: First name of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_name_mi
description: Middle initial of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_role
description: Role of researcher or other person in experiment or dataset preparation

name: researcher_address
description: Mailing address of researcher

name: institute_id
description: Links to institution associated w person

name: e_mail_address
description: E-mail address of researcher

name: persons_notes
description: Additional notes on persons involved with the experiment(s)

name: institute_id
description: Unique identifier to identify an institution associated with a dataset

name: institute_name
description: Names of participating institutions

name: institute_type
description: Type of participating institutions

name: institute_role
description: Role of participating institutions

name: institute_notes
description: Additional notes on institutions associated with the experiment(s)

name: document_id
description: Unique identifier to identify an document associated with a dataset

name: document_name
description: Document name in abbreviated form

name: digital_object_id
description: Digital Object Identifier according to international standard (DOI)

name: document_type
description: Description of type of document (e.g., photo, graphic, memo, etc.

name: document_date
description: Description of type of document (e.g., photo, graphic, memo, etc.

name: document_link
description: URL for location of digital document

name: document_notes
description: Additional notes on a document related to the dataset

name: plot_id
description: Plot identification

name: plot_area
description: Plot area (gross) per rep

name: plot_row_number
description: Plot row number for single plot or treatment

name: plot_length
description: Plot length (gross) for single plot or treatment

name: plot_width
description: Plot width (gross) for single plot or treatment

name: plot_orientation
description: Plot orientation (from North)

name: drainage_orientation
description: Drainage orientation (from North)

name: plots_relative_to_drains
description: Plots relative to drains

name: plot_separation
description: Spacing between individual plots, if any

name: plot_harvest_area
description: Plot harvest area

name: plot_harvest_row_number
description: Plot harvest row number

name: plot_harvest_length
description: Plot harvest length

name: plot_harvest_width
description: Plot harvest width

name: harvest_method_plot
description: Plot harvest method (eg.Hand, combine)

name: plot_layout
description: Plot layout or experimental design (e.g., "RCBD with four blocks")

name: constraints
description: Constraints known to affect crop performance

name: complications
description: Complications arising during experiment

name: experiment_rating
description: Rating of experiment for completeness, correctness, etc. (e.g., using AgMIP sentinal site rating system)

name: exper_rating_system
description: Name of the system used to rate the data from the experiment

name: exper_rating_date
description: Date of rating

name: exper_rating_person
description: Initials of person conducting the assessment

name: orig_data_source
description: Original format of data (DSSAT, APSIM, CIMMYT, field log, etc)

name: last_update
description: Date of last upload of information to experimental data

name: crop_model_version
description: Crop model version related to experiment (if any)

name: exper_rating_mgmt
description: Rating of experiment for management data

name: exper_rating_observations
description: Rating of experiment for observed data

name: exper_rating_soils
description: Rating of experiment for soil data

name: exper_rating_weather
description: Rating of experiment for weather data

name: exper_rating_notes
description: Deatailed explanations of reasons behind rating or other relevant information

name: suite_id
description: Suite identifiers

name: suite_name
description: Brief name of suite of experiments

name: suite_objectives_of_study
description: Objectives of the study

name: suite_main_experiment_factor
description: Main factor, factors or interactions of interest in an experiment

name: suite_experimental_factor_comb
description: Experimental factor combinations

name: suite_experiment_type
description: General type of experiment, e.g., varietal trial

name: suite_distrib_restrictions
description: Distribution limitations for the data set

name: suite_keywords
description: Keywords for dataset

name: suite_data_source
description: Original format of  data (DSSAT, APSIM, CIMMYT, field log, etc)

name: suite_citation
description: Full citation for experimental data

name: suite_license
description: License associated with experiment

name: suite_notes
description: Additional notes describing the datasets comprising a suite

name: suite_researcher_address
description: Mailing address of researcher

name: suite_persons_notes
description: Additional notes on persons involved with the experiment(s)

name: suite_email_address
description: E-mail address of researcher

name: suite_orcid
description: ORCId of researcher(s)

name: suite_institute_name
description: Names of participating institutions

name: suite_document_name
description: Document name in abbreviated form

name: suite_digital_object_id
description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) according to international standard
